designSystem.style: Clean, data-rich mobile UI with sky-blue accent palette. Uses card-based layouts with subtle shadows, color-coded weather zone indicators, SVG route visualization, and smooth toggle interactions. Light mode defaults to airy blues; dark mode uses deep navy surfaces with vibrant cyan highlights.

screens: Route — Interactive block-level route map with SVG waypoints, weather zone color coding, stat strip, active block detail card, and Weather Smart Shortcuts
Compare — Side-by-side route comparison cards with comfort score rings, rain/wind/sun metrics, animated bar chart for rain exposure, and recommendation badge
Timeline — Departure time picker with comfort scores, block-by-block zone forecast grid, full-day overview heat-map, and best window highlight
Alerts — Live crowd-sourced condition reports with thumbs-up voting, active rain banner, categorized alert cards with location and reporter attribution
Settings — User profile card, dark mode toggle, notification preferences, route mode toggles (cyclist, units), and data source info
